requirement_topic.en: China GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023 Baseline vs Kenya Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 中国GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023基线与肯尼亚接受差距
requirement_topic.zht: 中國GB 44240-2024 / GB/T 36276-2023基線與肯亞接受差距

summary.en: Kenya-side reviewers may treat China GB / GB/T BESS reports as supporting evidence only if the KEBS PVoC agent, Kenya standard / approved specification, EPRA / utility reviewer, project owner, insurer, or contract accepts them. China domestic compliance should not be presented as automatic Kenya compliance for import, IEC evidence, grid connection, mini-grid approval, fire / EHS, transport, or customs.
summary.zh: 只有在KEBS PVoC机构、肯尼亚标准/认可规范、EPRA/公用事业审查方、项目业主、保险方或合同接受时，肯尼亚侧审查方才可能将中国GB/GB/T BESS报告作为支持性证据。中国国内合规不应被表述为自动满足肯尼亚进口、IEC证据、并网、微电网批准、消防/EHS、运输或海关要求。
summary.zht: 只有在KEBS PVoC機構、肯亞標準／認可規範、EPRA／公用事業審查方、項目業主、保險方或合約接受時，肯亞側審查方才可能將中國GB／GB/T BESS報告作為支持性證據。中國國內合規不應被表述為自動滿足肯亞進口、IEC證據、併網、微電網批准、消防／EHS、運輸或海關要求。

standards_or_laws: KEBS PVoC and applicable Kenya standard / approved specification
EPRA, utility, fire / EHS, transport, customs, and project requirements applicable to the shipment or site

summary.en: The China BESS baseline commonly includes GB 44240-2024 for safety of lithium-ion cells and batteries for electric energy storage, GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage, and GB/T 36558-2023 for electrochemical energy storage system technical requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS基线通常包括电力储能用锂离子电芯和电池安全要求GB 44240-2024、电力储能用锂离子电池GB/T 36276-2023，以及电化学储能系统技术要求GB/T 36558-2023。
summary.zht: 中國BESS基線通常包括電力儲能用鋰離子電芯和電池安全要求GB 44240-2024、電力儲能用鋰離子電池GB/T 36276-2023，以及電化學儲能系統技術要求GB/T 36558-2023。

gap.en: Create a Kenya acceptance matrix that identifies which Chinese GB clauses support the PVoC file, which clauses map to IEC 62619 / IEC 62933, which documents support EPRA / utility / fire review, and which gaps require Kenya-specific tests, English documents, labels, declarations, or local approvals.
gap.zh: 应建立肯尼亚接受矩阵，说明哪些中国GB条款支持PVoC文件，哪些条款映射至IEC 62619 / IEC 62933，哪些文件支持EPRA/公用事业/消防审查，以及哪些缺口需要肯尼亚特定测试、英文文件、标签、声明或当地批准。
gap.zht: 應建立肯亞接受矩陣，說明哪些中國GB條款支持PVoC文件，哪些條款映射至IEC 62619／IEC 62933，哪些文件支持EPRA／公用事業／消防審查，以及哪些缺口需要肯亞特定測試、英文文件、標籤、聲明或當地批准。

mandatory_status.target: Kenya acceptance is mandatory only where a Kenya authority, PVoC agent, utility, fire / EHS reviewer, customs route, insurer, lender, or contract requires the mapped evidence; China GB reports alone are not confirmed as a sufficient Kenya approval route
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are recommended national standards unless incorporated by regulation or contract

source.title: GB 44240-2024 — 电能存储系统用锂蓄电池和电池组 安全要求 (Secondary lithium cells and batteries for electrical energy storage systems — Safety requirements)
source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation / National Public Service Platform for Standards Information (China)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 as China baseline evidence, not as automatic Kenya compliance. Acceptance must be confirmed by the specific KEBS, PVoC, EPRA, utility, fire / EHS, transport, customs, or contract path.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023作为中国基线证据，而非自动肯尼亚合规证明。接受性必须由具体KEBS、PVoC、EPRA、公用事业、消防/EHS、运输、海关或合同路径确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023作為中國基線證據，而非自動肯亞合規證明。接受性必須由具體KEBS、PVoC、EPRA、公用事業、消防／EHS、運輸、海關或合約路徑確認。
